name: Fastlane Road To Revenge Master - Car Racing
description: Fastlane Road To Revenge Master is a very modern arcade game. Unlike the punch and kick of traditional arcade games, the racing game can also become a kind of arcade game. You can not only drive the racing car to enjoy the ultimate speed but also shoot at will. Blow up the vehicle in front, and collect the gold coins on the road by the way. When the gold coins accumulate to a certain level, you can buy new racing cars and better equipment. Why are you still hesitating? Come and experience this game!
tags: Boy, Boys, Car, Cars, Kid, Kids, Race, Racing, Shoot, Shooting
